patch:
--- a/adder_module.v
+++ b/adder_module.v
@@ -1,11 +1,11 @@
 module adder_module(
   input [7:0] a,
   input [7:0] b,
   input [7:0] c,
   output reg [7:0] result
 );
 
-  always @(a)
+  always @(a or b or c)
   begin
     result = a + b + c;
   end
 
 endmodule
before_code:
module adder_module(
  input [7:0] a,
  input [7:0] b,
  input [7:0] c,
  output reg [7:0] result
);

  always @(a)
  begin
    result = a + b + c;
  end

endmodule
after_code:
module adder_module(
  input [7:0] a,
  input [7:0] b,
  input [7:0] c,
  output reg [7:0] result
);

  always @(a or b or c)
  begin
    result = a + b + c;
  end

endmodule
